purpose: Machine-readable contract for cluster lifecycle policies used by provider-backed and external-cluster experimental cycles.
governanceRules: Every provider-backed cycle must declare a cluster lifecycle policy before provisioning is executed.
Reuse mode keeps the generated cluster available after the cycle unless an explicit destroy override is provided.
Ephemeral mode plans both cluster creation and explicit cluster deletion after the cycle.
External mode represents clusters whose lifecycle is not managed by the provider-backed pipeline.
Delete operations must never be inferred from provider availability alone; they require an explicit lifecycle policy and confirmation guard.
